summary: Implemented cycle-based alignment routing with planning_build support, pure gateway metadata, compact graph traceability, superseded cycle handling, and source-content freshness anchors.

evidence: Added planning_build smoke creation before implementation build; added graph assertions for documentation->planning routing, traceability missing_planning gap, and superseded feedback cycles.
Existing drift propagation test now validates source-content spec edits stale freshness anchors.
notes: Tests were updated before final validation pass and failed once on traceability gap expectation before graph filter was corrected.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: Implemented writePlanningBuild, cycle/policy/requirements/evidence mapping fields, source_planning_build consumption, planning build graph indexing, traceability rows, superseded build suppression, validation policy metadata, and doc source digest freshness.
notes: Maintained compatibility with existing feedback/documentation/implementation builds; no .codewiki/cycles tree added; hot traceability filters historical cold builds.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: Added planning_build smoke creation before implementation build; added graph assertions for documentation->planning routing, traceability missing_planning gap, and superseded feedback cycles.
Existing drift propagation test now validates source-content spec edits stale freshness anchors.
code_change_evidence: Implemented writePlanningBuild, cycle/policy/requirements/evidence mapping fields, source_planning_build consumption, planning build graph indexing, traceability rows, superseded build suppression, validation policy metadata, and doc source digest freshness.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: codewiki_build and schemas support planning/planning_build with cycle metadata, policy criteria, requirement ids, source refs, and evidence mappings while preserving compatibility.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Added planning kind to types/schemas/writeBuild, planning build writer, cycle/policy/requirements/evidence fields, and smoke coverage in tests/smoke/builds.test.mjs and scripts/smoke-test.mjs.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Gateway/validation reporting treats builds as submitted artifact and records pass/fail/block against build policy and evidence.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Validation reports now carry policy_profile, failed_criteria, and blocking_questions; gateway docs/skills define pure build validation.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Graph reconciliation routes feedback->documentation, documentation->planning, planning->implementation, implementation->validation/publication from explicit refs and evidence.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Graph indexes planning builds, consumes.documentation/planning refs, documentation->planning routing, planning build consumption, superseded cycle handling, and tests assert documentation builds route to planning.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Graph/state expose compact hot traceability gaps and keep cold history explicit-on-demand.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Graph traceability view emits hot requirement rows only for active/unconsumed/open-task-linked feedback, with requirement-to-KB/planning/task/test/code/implementation/validation refs and compact gap list.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Freshness anchors include knowledge source content and exclude volatile generated fields.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: state-builders adds source-content doc revision digests and drift propagation test covers spec-only edits staling anchors while generated graph edits do not.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Implementation loop consumes planning builds where available and records TDD/test-design evidence or exception.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Implementation build supports source_planning_build and consumes.planning; skills/docs route implementation through planning builds; smoke tests assert planning build artifact digests and role evidence.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Smoke tests cover planning_build creation/consumption, superseded cycle handling, traceability-gap routing, spec-only freshness changes, and hot-only graph behavior.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Updated builds, drift-propagation, hot-context/hot-retention via full test:features/test:smoke/npm test passes.

closure_brief.user_intent: Refactor CodeWiki alignment so loop cycles are builds, gateway validates builds only, planning is explicit before implementation, and graph supports alignment without becoming the source of truth.
implemented_changes: Documented four-loop CDD/TDD alignment model and pure gateway responsibilities.
Added planning_build/cycle metadata support to types, schemas, build writer, graph loader, and smoke tests.
Updated implementation builds to consume source_planning_build and publish planning artifact digests.
Added graph routing for documentation->planning, planning build consumption, superseded cycle suppression, and compact requirement traceability gaps.
Added source-content doc revision fingerprints so spec-only edits stale agency freshness anchors.
acceptance_evidence: All TASK-073 acceptance criteria mapped in implementation build acceptance_mapping.
non_goals_preserved: Graph remains generated index/state and does not own requirements.
Backward compatibility with existing build kinds preserved.
remaining_risks: Reload required for current Pi tool schema to expose planning kind in this running session.

risks: Current runtime tool schema in this already-running Pi session may require /reload before codewiki_build kind=planning is accepted through the tool UI.
Traceability is compact and source-backed but initial matrix is intentionally minimal; richer clause-level KB mapping can be added later.
